root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as mem_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_sharestock(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as share_stock
, NVL(( select salary_amount from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where 1=1 and membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ),0) as salary_amount
, NVL(( select academic_salary from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where 1=1 and membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ),0) as academic_salary
, NVL(( select remuneration_amount from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where 1=1 and membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ),0) as remuneration_amount
, NVL(( select salary_real from sc_mem_m_member_work_info where 1=1 and membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ),0) as salary_real
-- ที่อยู่ปัจจุบัน , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '6' ) , '-' , '' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '6' ) ) AS address_pres_address_no , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '8' ) , '-' , '' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '8' ) ) AS address_pres_moo , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '7' ) , '-' , '' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '7' ) ) AS address_pres_mooban , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '9' ) , '-' , '' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '9' ) ) AS address_pres_road , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '10' ) , '-' , '' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '10' ) ) AS address_pres_soi , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '11' ) , '-' , '' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '11' ) ) AS address_pres_tambol , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '12' ) , '-' , '' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '12' ) ) AS address_pres_district , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '13' ) , '-' , '' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '13' ) ) AS address_pres_province , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '14' ) , '-' , '' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '14' ) ) AS address_pres_post , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '15' ) , '-' , '' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '15' ) ) AS address_pres_telephone
, decode(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code,'0','เป็นสมาชิก','พ้นสภาพ') as member_status_code , pka_com_function.fp_get_loan_balance_by_mem(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as loan_balance_mem from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group
where 1=1 and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' or sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no in ( select membership_no from sc_lon_m_loan_card where principal_balance > 0 ) )
/*WHERE*/
order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
